name: K8s E2E CI Failures
note: Both k8s-e2e jobs green: k8s-behavioral-tests #103 (298 Passed | 0 Failed) and k8s-integration-tests #184 succeeded. Behavioral pod-termination fixed (serial_groups chaining via passed constraint + reduced docker build context); integration check-exec race fixed (transient-error classification + exec retry / pause-pod recreation); kind-runner image bumped to bust stale node-image cache. FAILURES.md updated to cite build #103. Note: build-kind-runner #186 errored on an infra flake (#185 green) — CI-builder reliability is tracked separately under ci_reliability_k8s_e2e_20260530.
